title: Magrathea task descriptor
description: A file the runtime reads instead of a hardcoded task. Paths are relative to the repo the runtime runs in (no absolute machine paths). The runtime enforces governance against task_class before dispatch.

target_repo.description: Repo root the task runs against, relative to the runtime's cwd. '.' = this repo.

working_dir.description: The worker's writable scope (relative to target_repo), sandboxed workspace-write to here only, e.g. 'gate'.

goal.description: What the worker must achieve (make the failing gate pass, nothing more).

task_class.description: feature | refactor | test-authoring | dependency-bump | security-sensitive | bulk-delete | git-history | infra. Always-human classes are refused (see governance).

gate_command.description: The deterministic verification command. Pass iff it exits 0. No model.

gate_dir.description: Directory to run gate_command in, relative to target_repo.

retry_budget.description: codex-reply retries on a gate-red, on the same thread.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-task worker timeout (retires the old global 420s cap).
